global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and clear messaging about a discount offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on products with a call to action.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A bold, white logo with the text 'ZenDrop' prominently displayed against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Large, white text stating 'Your next favorite pick' positioned centrally in the ad.

elements.label: Discount information
elements.description: Smaller text indicating a discount of '30%' in a vibrant color, placed below the headline.

elements.label: Shipping information
elements.description: Text stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font, located beneath the discount information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Start now' inviting users to take action, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A rounded rectangle shape in a contrasting color that serves as a background for the text elements.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: An abstract graphic element that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top of the ad, possibly a banner or accent.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid color background that provides contrast to the text and graphic elements.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick 30%8re 25 Start now

elements.label: ZenDrop headline
elements.description: The prominent logo text 'ZenDrop' displayed in a large, bold font at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, ZenDrop logo, discount offer, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, discount information, and a call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, Your next favorite pick, -30%, Free shipping over $25, Start now
